title: Sniper's Moon
description: Adds a Moon that increases Arrow damage to Enhanced Celestials
body:
During the rare Sniper's Moon event, all arrow damage will be increased, and during a Super Sniper's Moon, arrow damage will greatly increase and more skeletons will spawn in the world. The arrow damage increase applies to all arrows shot by both players and mobs, including skeletons and pillagers.

 

Requires Projectile Damage Attribute

 

 All credit for Enhanced Celestials goes to Corgi Taco
